reason: The per-soldier weapon animation only draws at the zoomed-in figure LOD (camera zoom past LOD_ZOOM_IN). The static demo camera films the battle zoomed out, where soldiers are flat marks and no blades show, so a recorded clip can't capture it. See the zoomed-in screenshot in the PR description instead (demos/shots/weapon-animation.png). Camera-dependent demo recording is tracked in #222/#247.
